summary: Herion Batch 5 Testing Complete - Guard, Follow-Up, Template Instance all working. 14/14 backend tests passed, all frontend features verified.
seed_data_creation: Nexus S.r.l. practice auto-seeded from COMPANY_CLOSURE template at startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5 Herion Guard, Follow-Up System, Template Instance fully tested and working. All 14 backend API tests pass. Frontend pages load correctly with all features functional. Guard panel displays verdict, score, dimensions, and safe alternatives. Follow-Up page shows summary cards, filters, item list with resolve button (admin only). Nexus S.r.l. practice seeded from COMPANY_CLOSURE template.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/guard/evaluate/{practice_id} - returns verdict, dimensions, guard_score, safe_alternatives, can_proceed
GET /api/guard/summary - returns evaluations list with cleared/guarded/blocked counts

features_verified: Guard score percentage with progress bar
Safe alternatives section with actionable suggestions

endpoints_tested: GET /api/follow-ups - returns follow-up items with urgency states (pending/overdue/critical/resolved)
GET /api/follow-ups/summary - returns counts (total_open, pending, overdue, critical, resolved)
PATCH /api/follow-ups/{id} - resolves follow-up (admin only, returns 403 for users)
follow_up_api.urgency_escalation: Auto-escalates from pending -> overdue -> critical based on time elapsed

features_verified: Summary cards (Aperti, In Attesa, Scaduti, Critici, Risolti)

endpoints_tested: POST /api/practices/from-template - creates practice from catalog template

creator_password_protection.test_credentials_md: Shows 'PROTECTED' for creator password, not actual password

navigation.follow_up_link: Visible in navigation bar for all authenticated users
